2237520.name: A Summer in Our Hearts
2237520.description: A Summer in Our Hearts is a slice of life visual novel set to explore the life of three young adults, each from a very different background with very different personalities, and how they deal with their personal struggles. Each is trying to put their best foot forward and find their own way towards happiness. Help each other along the way, or stand by and watch as they go on their separate path. Create bonds that last for a lifetime, or walk away to build your own life. Will a short summer, away in a foreign town in the middle of nowhere, enough to push your way towards happiness?
2237520.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
